title: Infinity With Mending
description: Give you the ability to combine Infinity with Mending
body:
**A Forge mod which remove the boundary between Infinity and Mending.**

Which means you can **combine** them and use them **together**. 

(Just because I can't find a 1.12.2 mod so I built this XD)

Now supports:

Forge: **1.12.2 | 1.16.5 | 1.18 - 1.20.1**

Fabric / Quilt: **1.14 - 1.20.4**

**Feel free to use.**

If you are going to distribute the mod to other website, you **should** tell me.

(It's okay not to tell me since it is MIT license, but I still want to see)
